items.name: Astralis
items.description:
Forged through the eons from crystallized stardust, this legendary blade emerged as gravitational forces meticulously shaped it from celestial essence. Imbued with a flawless equilibrium befitting its extraordinary density, the blade emanates a glowing violet and purple gradient that shimmers in the celestial light. Those who grasp its hilt become vessels of the mighty forces that govern the vast expanse of space...

Created by VOEW; This sword uses PBR materials and dynamically changes based on the lighting of the experience your in!

Dripping in 2000s luxury, the Gold 2000s Luxury McBling Gyaru Necklace Knuckle is the ultimate trendsetter piece. Imagine stepping out of a pink leopard-print limo, paparazzi flashes bouncing off your vintage glam statement necklace. The bold brass knuckle charm exudes attitude, while the shimmering diamond and twinkling star catch the light, radiating pure McBling energy. Channeling the fierce, over-the-top aesthetic of Y2K icons, this piece is made for those who dare to sparkle, shine, and rule the scene with unapologetic glamour.
